title: collomia tracyi
intro: Collomia tracyi, also known as Tracy's collomia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Polemoniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have made it beneficial in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Collomia tracyi include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and exhibit antimicrobial activities. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts are used in herbal remedies to alleviate various health conditions.
